title: Cosmos Flap — tap a glowing orb through gaps in cosmic pipes
summary: A real, self-contained Flappy-style arcade game in a single HTML file with zero dependencies. You flap a glowing orb to thread it through gaps between scrolling violet pipes — gravity constantly pulls it down. Score one point per pipe cleared, crash on any pipe, the ceiling, or the ground, then restart. Playable with keyboard and touch. It also ships a deterministic self-playing attract demo for capture: a seeded AI flaps the orb perfectly through the same seeded gaps, rendered as a pure function of time via window.__seek(t).
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html. CONTROLS: SPACE or tap/click anywhere on the board to flap the orb upward; R key or the Restart button to start over after a crash. GOAL: pass through as many pipe gaps as possible — +1 score per pipe; you die on collision with a pipe, the ceiling, or the ground. KEY TECHNIQUES: the game is a fixed-timestep (16ms) deterministic simulation; pipe gap centers come from a mulberry32-seeded stream keyed by pipe index, so AUTO replays identically; the seeded auto-player aims a touch above each upcoming gap center and flaps when the orb falls past it, threading every gap without dying; AUTO re-simulates from a fixed initial state to t each seek (N small) so the frame is a pure function of time, with a START offset so frame 0 is already mid-flight with score>0. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 self-plays + window.__seek(t). TUNE: GRAV, FLAP, GAP, SPEED, SPACING, PW, R, LOOP, and the auto target offset.
